name: Mazes Draw The Path
description: Dive into an engaging world of logic puzzles where your goal is to find the exit by drawing the path yourself. This interactive game features unique gameplay: instead of controlling a character directly, you create a route while avoiding obstacles. Each level presents a fresh challenge that demands strategic thinking and precision. Perfect for short breaks and training spatial reasoning.
instructions: 1 Click and hold your mouse finger on the start 2 Draw a path to the exit avoiding walls 3 Collect stars to earn more points
